concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出6条假设，包括无人机尺寸、安全距离、点光源行为、飞行时间、成本、速度，为后续建模提供基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Initially, we assumed that the drones created by Intel are one square foot each... We assume that the drones will require a 5 foot radius sphere of empty airspace around them for safe flight... We also assume that, when the drones are in the sky, they behave like point light sources.

concepts_used.title: K-Means 聚类
concepts_used.how_used: 未使用K-Means聚类，但论文中使用了六边形堆积（hexagonal packing）来高效布置地面无人机，属于空间布局优化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: For the most efficient use of ground space, we use a hexagonal packing method.

concepts_used.title: 旅行商问题（TSP）
concepts_used.how_used: 未直接使用TSP，但论文中为每个无人机设定具体路径和位置，类似于路径规划，但未给出具体算法。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We chose to set specific courses and positions for each drone in the model.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中使用了示意图展示摩天轮、龙和太阳系的无人机布局，属于可视化展示设计。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We sketched first the ferris wheel, then the dragon and solar system and plotted points where each of the drones would be placed.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文第12节为灵敏度分析，但内容未详细给出，仅提及标题。

concepts_used.title: 三天/四天赛程时间分配
concepts_used.how_used: 论文中规划了表演时间线：摩天轮3分钟、过渡1分钟、龙3分钟、过渡1分钟、太阳系3分钟、返回1分钟，共约12分钟。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The entire ferris wheel section of the show will last 3 minutes... Then, another transition period of one minute will occur... The solar system display will last for three minutes.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 论文比较了购买和租赁无人机的成本，使用加权求和思想，但未明确公式。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We recommend the buying option of the drones. We would be able to run our own displays and use the drones whenever the city wished.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文结构遵循IMRaD格式：摘要、引言（问题重述）、假设、建模（摩天轮、龙、太阳系）、结果（持续时间、空域、安全、成本）、灵敏度分析、结论。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: 1 Restatement of the Problem... 2 Assumptions... 4 Drone Launching... 5 Ferris Wheel... 6 Dragon... 7 Our Own Display: The Solar System... 8 Duration of the Show... 9 Air Space... 10 Safety/Legality... 11 Cost... 12 Sensitivity Analysis... 13 Conclusion
